title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.967 - Lobbyists not to serve on certain commissions
text:
105.967.  Lobbyists not to serve on certain commissions. — After January 1, 1992, no person shall be appointed to or serve on any of the commissions created under Section 2 or Section 7 of Article III of the State Constitution while acting as a lobbyist, as defined by section 105.470.
(L. 1991 S.B. 262 § 7)
